Sep 2, 2010 TextMate is an intelligent text editor for Macs from http://macromates.com/. TextMate is licensed by UCB and available from http://software-central.Berkeley.edu/software/71-TextMate.

oftware-central.Berkeley.edu/software/71-TextMate. TextMate is installed on the MacPros in 200 Sutardja-Dai Hall. For a list of the computers, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst/iesglabs.html EECS Instructional
